title: Introduction to Causal Inference with Quantitative Methods
further_info: Recommended Reading 1. Huntington-Klein, Nick. The Effect: An Introduction to Research Design and Causality. Taylor & Francis, 2025. 2. Cunningham, Scott. Causal Inference: The Mixtape. Yale University Press, 2021. 3. Angrist, Joshua D., and Jörn-Steffen Pischke. Mastering Metrics: The Path from Cause to Effect. Princeton Univers. Press, 2015.
